text:
Created attachment 177010
diff relative to lang/dmd2

While adding BROKEN lines for tier-2, I always try to pet portlint.  The two Makefiles here were so annoying to portlint that I had to do more rework than usual.  Even so, this was not enough to completely satisfy it.  So, I would like maintainer approval.
